description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion bottle with a white body and a dark gray dispenser top. The front label features a colorful diagonal stripe design in orange, yellow, and red, with the brand name 'Meriten' and the product name 'VITA D' prominently displayed. The bottle has a smooth, glossy surface and a rounded shoulder that transitions into a narrower neck, topped with a spray dispenser. The cap is a matching dark gray and appears to be a screw-on style, fitting snugly over the spray mechanism. The back and sides of the bottle are plain, with the label only partially wrapping around. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A white cylindrical lotion bottle with a dark gray spray dispenser and a colorful front label featuring the brand 'Meriten' and product name 'VITA D'. The bottle has a smooth, glossy finish and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful label with 'Meriten VITA D' and the spray dispenser cap.
description_view_1: Side view with the label barely visible, highlighting the bottle's smooth, rounded shape and dark gray dispenser.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain white back and the full shape of the bottle and cap.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the label and the transition from the bottle body to the dispenser.
